items.title: Run schema definition
items.description: Complete description of the run schema.

System name.description: Internal system name. Default will be an automatic conversion of Name to a Benchling/PostgreSQL compatible name.

Description.description: Documentation for the run schema. This is not saved to Benchling.

Notify.description: Causes the supplied message to be printed to the output during an import operation. Use this to tell the user to take some manual action such as setting permissions.

Allow creating new runs.description: When true, allows users to create new runs from the notebook. Corresponds to the 'Allow creating new runs from the notebook' checkbox in the Benchling UI. At least one of 'Allow creating new runs' or 'Allow inserting runs from inbox' must be true.

Allow inserting runs from inbox.description: When true, allows users to insert runs from the inbox into the notebook. Corresponds to the 'Allow inserting runs from inbox in the notebook' checkbox in the Benchling UI. At least one of 'Allow creating new runs' or 'Allow inserting runs from inbox' must be true.

Diagram.description: Properties solely used for diagram rendering.

Description.description: Documentation for the field. This is not saved to Benchling.

Tool tip.description: Field tool tip appears on hover on column headings.

System name.description: Internal system name for the field. Default will be an automatic conversion of Name to a Benchling/PostgreSQL compatible name.

Multi-select.description: Field is a multi-select field when true.

Definition.description: Name of target object if Type is a link type (Entity, Inventory, Run) or Dropdown.

Input file configurations.description: Input file configurations for automation. These are stored as passthrough objects — the structure is preserved verbatim from Benchling and is not fully schematized. Environment-specific IDs are stripped on export and regenerated on import.

items.description: A single input file configuration. Contents are opaque passthrough data.

Output file configurations.description: Output file configurations for automation. These are stored as passthrough objects — the structure is preserved verbatim from Benchling and is not fully schematized. Environment-specific IDs are stripped on export and regenerated on import.

items.description: A single output file configuration. Contents are opaque passthrough data.

API ID.description: API ID for the schema created during an export operation. This is ignored for import operations.
